steps.title: Identify the core requirement
steps.content: The goal is to provide a historical overview of “the two theories”—both extramission and intromission must be covered.

steps.title: Match the goal to the choices
steps.content:
A presents both theories and traces the historical arc from scholarly division to Ibn al-Haytham's resolution, providing a complete overview.

C and D cover only intromission and omit extramission; B mentions both theories but wrongly suggests the three scholars held aligned views, contradicting the opposition premise.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
